verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There are those who say, God's just in our minds And the things we are searching for we'll surely never find But the joy He placed within my heart, I just can't conceal When He saved me He gave me, Something I can feel

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Something I can feel, Something I know is real In trouble times, there's peace of mind and a hand to hold onto Oh the joy He placed within my heart, I just can't conceal When He saved me He gave me something I can feel

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And there are those who say, God's is dead They laugh, they mock, the precious Words, that my saviour said, And they say that my emotions is just a cheap thrill But am so glad when He saved me, He gave me, something I can feel!
